subject: fix(docs): replace stale product names and clean up orphaned compliance comment
body:
Three docs still referenced old product names ("Pricing Equilibrium Calculator",
"Revenue Model Calculator") instead of "Software Transaction Structuring Tool".
Also cleaned up a misleading "COMPLIANCE (to be implemented)" section in
calculator/src/index.ts that referenced a never-created module — transfer pricing
is fully implemented inline in each model's calculate function.

Tags: docs, cleanup, naming
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

title: replace stale product names and clean up orphaned compliance comment
